catalog.name: Hot Pilot
catalog.description: Improvised flying at the edge of the envelope.
catalog.effect: +1 to Tech rolls when piloting under threat. On a partial, the maneuver works but ship_wear: +1. On a failure, the maneuver costs ship_wear: +2 instead of the standard +1.

catalog.name: Gunner's Eye
catalog.description: Trained ship-weapon discipline.
catalog.effect: +1 to Reflex rolls in ship-to-ship gunnery. Veteran: lock-on bonus on the first shot. Ace: can call a single specific component to disable on a full success.

catalog.name: Engine Whisperer
catalog.description: An almost-superstitious read on a ship's drive condition.
catalog.effect: On a successful Tech roll, you can clear 1 ship_wear by spending an hour of careful work. Once per session.

catalog.name: Hard Burn
catalog.description: Risking it all for a single decisive maneuver.
catalog.effect: On a Tech roll, you may declare a hard burn: success grants the maneuver and ship_wear: +1. Failure costs ship_wear: +2 and a complication on the next scene.

catalog.name: Combat Medic
catalog.description: Battlefield triage with whatever's at hand.
catalog.effect: Tech roll to stabilize a downed ally and restore 1d6 hp_current. Veteran: also clears one minor condition. Ace: works once per scene without rolling.

catalog.name: Smooth Talker
catalog.description: Frontier diplomacy.
catalog.effect: +1 to Charm rolls in negotiation, deception, or de-escalation. Veteran: can re-roll a failed Charm roll once per session. Ace: openly hostile NPCs grant one moment of pause before violence.

catalog.name: Rumor Hound
catalog.description: A nose for the dockside rumor that matters.
catalog.effect: Once per session in a station or settlement, learn one piece of useful information for free. Veteran: the GM also adds a hook tied to it.

catalog.name: Frontier Medicine
catalog.description: Long-term care, not just emergency triage.
catalog.effect: When the crew rests for a full day in a safe place, you can clear one persistent injury or condition per day instead of the default rest rate.

catalog.name: Dock Contacts
catalog.description: A useful acquaintance in most ports.
catalog.effect: Once per session, declare a previously-unmentioned contact in a port who happens to be here. The GM integrates them into the scene.

catalog.name: Salvage Eye
catalog.description: Reads value and danger in a wrecked hull at a glance.
catalog.effect: On a Tech roll near a wreck or derelict, you learn one major hazard and one piece of recoverable cargo without entering. Veteran: also a faction-relevant detail (whose ship was this?).

catalog.name: Witchsense
catalog.description: Sensing alien presence and the texture of deep-dark wrongness.
catalog.effect: Edge roll: success reveals one significant alien-touched truth (recently active, listening, hungry). On a partial, you sense it but it senses you back. On failure: heat: +1 and you do not see what is watching.

catalog.name: Read the Glyphs
catalog.description: Pattern recognition for non-human writing.
catalog.effect: Edge roll over 30 minutes near alien script. Success: a clear partial translation. Partial: an evocative but ambiguous reading; heat: +1. Failure: heat: +2 and you draw attention you did not intend.

catalog.name: Hand the Old Tech
catalog.description: Activating an alien artifact in a controlled way.
catalog.effect: Edge roll. Success: the artifact does what you wanted. Partial: it does almost what you wanted, plus heat: +1. Failure: heat: +2 and the artifact does something its makers wanted, not you.

catalog.name: Deep Calm
catalog.description: Standing in the alien noise without flinching.
catalog.effect: Once per scene, ignore one fear or compulsion effect from alien sources. Veteran: the immunity covers your immediate crew as well.

catalog.name: Trail Sense
catalog.description: Tracking alien activity through normal-space cues.
catalog.effect: Edge roll in a place touched by alien activity. Success: you can track the most recent alien-tech presence to its next likely waypoint. Partial: heat: +1 in the process.

catalog.name: Ship-Bond
catalog.description: Your bond with your ship is uncanny — you know its moods.
catalog.effect: +1 starting Tech for ship-related rolls. The first time per session ship_wear would be inflicted, you may negate it instead.

catalog.name: Frontier Born
catalog.description: You grew up out here. The deep dark does not surprise you.
catalog.effect: +1 to Edge starting value. Once per scene, ignore a fear or panic effect that does not come from alien tech.

catalog.name: Old Crime
catalog.description: Somebody on a station somewhere knows what you did.
catalog.effect: Once per session you can name a contact in a port who owes you. In return, when entering a major populated port, the GM rolls heat: +1 reflecting the chance you've been spotted.

catalog.name: Marked by the Old Ones
catalog.description: Some alien thing touched you and left a sign you cannot quite hide.
catalog.effect: Start with 1 heat. Gain +1 to Edge rolls when the alien is involved. Some NPCs who have seen the sign before will react.

catalog.name: Ace Mechanic
catalog.description: The ship runs better because you live in the engine room.
catalog.effect: Increase ship_wear_threshold by 1 (your ship absorbs more punishment before a permanent problem).
